compiled_state.title: [record-test-status.sh]: RED markers not found when source file does not exist yet causing harvest gate failure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When a RED test targets a source file that has not been created yet, RED markers in .test-index are indexed under that non-existent source file. record-test-status.sh looks up markers by staged SOURCE files only. Since the source is not staged (it does not exist), markers are never found and status records as failed. harvest-worktree.sh then rejects with exit 2. Fix: also check markers for source files referenced by staged TEST files. Workaround: add markers to all staged source entries mapping to the same test.

comments.body: Investigation complete: bug is already fixed by b9a9-4cb3 (global marker scan fallback in find_global_red_marker_for_test). Behavioral test confirms the fix: when test file is staged but source doesn't exist, find_global_red_marker_for_test correctly finds the RED marker and tolerates the failure. Added regression test tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-staged-test-no-source.sh to prevent future regression.
comments.author: Test
